taxonomy: Ochyrorchis occlusa is a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This classification places it within the order Asparagales. As part of the Orchidaceae family, Ochyrorchis occlusa is closely related to other species of orchids.
uses: Ochyrorchis occlusa has been used in traditional medicine in the Himalayas. Its rhizomes are used to treat various ailments. It is said to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties.
